## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (requires a major version bump + migration note)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / tooling

## Contract Alignment

- [ ] This change matches the `liqo-platform` contract (endpoints, DTOs, enums, error codes)
- [ ] I did **not** introduce SDK methods/fields that don't exist in the platform
- [ ] N/A (docs/tooling only)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated `README.md` / `docs/` as needed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `docs/MIGRATION_GUIDE.md` (if breaking)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private URLs are included
